commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=975c3abc558a560f2ab42f53dd57b64e926a7c18)
commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps Telegram stale spool recovery's final claim-to-pending rename with ENOENT/EEXIST handling and adds a vanished-processing-file regression test.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +32. Total +44 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main can stat a stale processing file, have it removed before the final rename, and then throw ENOENT from the unguarded fs.rename. I did not run a repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer selection between overlapping open fixes, so this should stay in human review rather than an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(telegram): handle ENOENT race in spool drain recovery rename
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
